title: Grass Tweaks
description: Lowers The Grass Sides And Makes The Colormap Less Dull.
body:
Ever Thought Grass Was Too Short? Ever Thought The Greenery Was Too Dull And Boring? 
Then This Is The Pack For You!

![Literally Just The Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdd94cee6111a824974c35a9549202f9d84f41c2.png)

Now Your Grass Can Be Better Or Something, I Dunno, Hook Me Up With The Professionals On This Description Writing Thing.
